description: 14 Continued from Page 9 subdue especially when Justice ﬂaynom right and freedom as a hurhan being is _involved Accord ing to Evangelist Billy Grahm Men today are seeking various kinds of freedom even the smallest countries are now asking for independence Every little group of people in the world wants their political freedom nos only do we want political freedom today we also want moral free dom But the glaring paradox of this situation is that we already have freedom According to Article XIV of our Constitution as amended All persons born or thereof are citizens of the United and subject to the jurisdiction naturalized in the United States States and of the State wherein they reside No State shall make or enforce anv law which shall abridge the privileges or imumni ties of citizens of the United States nor shall any State deprive any personof life liberty or pro perty wiihout due process of law nor demy to anv person within its jurisdiction the equal profection of the laws When we marvel at Mr Wal laces complete disregard for the Constitution of the United States we are more greatly astonished that he has not been held respon sible
